titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5946

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=798 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.933879+00 | translation moa=799 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.944158+00

p.cl: Sciant omnes tam presentes quam futuri quod
ego Robertus filius Reginaldi de Ristona

de
di et concessi et hac presenti carta mea confirmaui deo et sancto Cuthberto et sancte Ebbe et
Priori et Monachis de Coldingham in puram et perpetuam elemosinam humagium et seruicium
quod Patricius Scotus de Ristona mihi et heredibus meis debebat pro terra quam eidem . P . et
heredibus suis dedi pro humagio et seruicio suo de terra mea in campo de Ristona cum omnibus es
chaetis sine aliquo retinemento que in mihi uel heredibus meis accidere poterunt de dicta
terra . Et ego Robertus et heredes mei aquietabimus dictum . P . et heredes suos uel suos assigna
tos de omni forinseco seruicio dicte terre pertinenti . tam uersus dominum Regem quam uersus
domum de Codlginham . excepto quod dictus . P . et heredes sui uel sui assignati reddent
annuatim domui de Coldingham . vi . denarios ad festum sancti Iohannis Baptiste nomine firme .
Et ut hec mea donatio inperpetuum firma permaneat presenti scripto sigillum meum apposui .

Hiis Testibus . Domino . W . de Morthingtona . Domino Alano de Swintona . Ada de Prender
gest . Galfrido Ridel . Ada de Ristona . Bertramo filio eius . Mauricio de Aytona . Iohanne filio
Helye . Ada clerico de Prendergest . Radulfo preposito . Radulfo seruiente . et multis Aliis

div.p: Let all men present as well as future know that I, Robert son of Reginald of Reston, have given and made firm by this my present charter, to God, Saint Cuthbert, Saint Æbbe, and the prior and monks of Coldingham, in pure and perpetual alms, the homage and service that Patrick Scott of Reston used to owe to me and my heirs for the land which the same Patrick and his heirs gave for his homage and service from my land in the grassland of Reston with all escheats, without any withholding, which could fall to me or my heirs from the said land. And I, Robert, and my heirs, shall acquit the said Patrick and his heirs or assigns of all forinsec service belonging to the said land, as well towards the lord king as towards the house of Coldingham, except what the said Patrick and his heirs or assigns return annually to the house of Coldingham, 6 pence at the feast of St John the Baptist as ferme. And that this my donation should remain firm, I have applied my seal to the present writing. With these witnesses: the lord William of Mordington; the lord Alan of Swinton; Adam of Prenderguest; Geoffrey Ridel; Adam of Reston; Bertram his son; Maurice of Ayton; John son of Elias; Adam, clerk of Prenderguest; Ralph the grieve; Ralph the sergeant; and many others.
